headline: Data Scientist | Applied ML, NLP & Deep Learning | Scalable ML & data systems on large datasets | Python | SQL | PyTorch | Spark
about: I am a data scientist with a developer's mindset and about 3 years of experience building cloud-native and data-intensive systems. My strongest work sits where messy datasets, production workflows, and machine learning meet, so I focus on turning raw information into dependable, decision-ready outputs for real operating environments.

Before and during my master's at the University of Houston-Clear Lake, I worked across Azure, .NET, SQL, Node.js, Docker, KQL, Splunk, and enterprise integration systems at TCS and Hexagon. That background shaped how I approach analytics and ML today: with equal attention to data quality, delivery reliability, system design, and measurable outcomes.

My recent work includes adversarial medical-imaging research accepted for publication and oral presentation at ICICT 2026, graph learning for disease clustering, Houston crime classification on 3.6M+ records, multimodal book-genre modeling, big-data hunger analytics, a real-time commerce platform, and an LLM-powered LinkedIn outreach agent. I am currently exploring Data Scientist, Applied ML, ML Engineer, and Data Engineering roles where I can own the path from ingestion and validation through modeling and production-minded delivery.

highlights: Mentored over 60 students in Databases, Big Data, and Python through labs and office hours.
Used a concept-first teaching approach to strengthen understanding rather than memorization.
Developed a structured feedback loop that improved student confidence and performance in programming assignments.

Architected high-availability integration landscapes using Dell Boomi to synchronize mission-critical data across Salesforce CRM, NetSuite ERP, and on-prem databases for global inventory and payroll domains.
Engineered real-time event-driven APIs and MDM flows with listeners and API gateways, applying reliability patterns to sustain 99.9% uptime for high-traffic business workflows.
Implemented AppDynamics and Splunk observability plus a custom traceability layer for migrations, reducing production incident triage time by 40%.
Led end-to-end integration delivery, translating ambiguous business requirements into reliable technical assets through architectural reviews and gap analysis.
Collaborated across distributed teams to validate end-to-end integrations and preserve data consistency and security during enterprise rollouts.
Engineered multi-partner ingestion workflows with Azure Data Factory and Durable Functions for 10+ global airline partners.
Developed high-performance gRPC and REST microservices in .NET Core and Dapper using clean architecture patterns for scalability and maintainability.
Architected SQL analytical layers for self-service bag drop systems, achieving 99.9% data accuracy and reducing manual audit overhead by 35%.
Built real-time telemetry pipelines for Tableau dashboards and deployed Application Insights plus KQL observability to maintain 24/7 operational reliability.
Optimized SQL Server, PostgreSQL, and Cosmos DB workloads and streamlined Docker plus Azure DevOps CI/CD to improve release quality for mission-critical services.

Bachelor of Technology in Mechanical Engineering
